description_long: This is a freestanding wooden shelf unit with four open shelves, each slightly angled and spaced evenly from top to bottom. The structure features a broad, stable base and a decorative top edge with two upward-pointing corners, giving it a distinctive silhouette. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a medium brown finish that highlights the natural texture of the material. The sides are solid panels, and the back is fully enclosed, providing support and rigidity. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the shelves are open for easy access. The overall design is rustic and functional, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or as outdoor urban furniture for storing or displaying items.
description: A rustic, freestanding wooden shelf unit with four open, angled shelves and a decorative top edge. The medium brown finish and visible wood grain give it a sturdy, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves, decorative top edge, and visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid panel construction and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a fully enclosed back panel with wood grain texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and shelf depth.
